title: isotrema thibeticum
intro: Isotrema thibeticum, a perennial plant species, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isotrema thibeticum are said to include wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In traditional herbal preparations, Isotrema thibeticum is often dried and made into a decoction or tincture to be used in the treatment of various ailments.
